facebook.caption:
4.3 stars. 624 reviews. Beach access and a pool on Trần Hưng Đạo.

Tahiti Hotel keeps it simple. No frills lobby, no resort markup. Just clean rooms, outdoor pool, and some units that walk straight to the beach.

For a Phu Quoc stay that does exactly what it says. 624 people agree.

Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
